history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A full-body, slightly distorted mirror selfie of a young man in a shopping mall. He is wearing a black jacket over a white t-shirt, black track pants with a white stripe detail on the side, and red and yellow sneakers. He is holding up a smartphone to take the picture. In the reflection behind him, another young man is visible, wearing a dark jacket and patterned shirt, and white Crocs. The background of the mall features bright, neon signage with text that appears to be in reverse due to the mirror. One sign is yellow and blue with the word "CELLBEES" or similar, and another is a blue "T" logo. There are also some plants, furniture, and ceiling lights visible in the reflection. The lighting is bright and artificial, typical of an indoor commercial space. The overall mood is casual and contemporary. The image style is a realistic photograph, but with the characteristic warping and distortion of a uniquely shaped mirror.
